Overload List
  NameDescription
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, FuncIRequest, IReadOnlyListSqlStatementRun, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, FuncIRequest, String, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, String, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the result of a call to a pre-defined SQL statement.
